response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience with a strong focus on backend systems, distributed architectures, and event-driven platforms, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of building and scaling multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments, handling real-time credit risk, or leading large engineering teams in fintech scale-ups. His recent roles emphasize broader software craftsmanship rather than specialized AI/ML leadership.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Sociomantic experience)
Proven track record in AI-agent tooling and MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration at re:cinq
Demonstrated ability to lead engineering initiatives and mentor teams (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course)
concerns: No explicit mention of fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance)
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10-20 people or establishing technical leadership layers
Lacks direct experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital management, or compliance in regulated environments
